title: Request: indent explanations for options in man pages
body: I find it quite hard to interpret the man pages since the options and their explanation is using the same indentation. Could the options be indented one more level?

comments.body: @herrenP thanks for the report. Would you be interested in submitting a PR?
Sure, I could give it a look. 👍
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
